blockers.note: Phase 5EF closed all 14 members at leaf 205. Vendored maspsx LOCAL PATCH (tools/era/maspsx/maspsx/__init__.py, opt-in env MASPSX_FILL_STORE_DELAY_SLOT=1) expands an absolute sw macro before a bare j $31 into lui/j/sw-in-slot. sw only: sb/sh stay pre-jr (ROM-proven). Pilot func_8007FBC0 plus the remaining 13 typed members rebuild exact. Types: seven int state/value globals, four callback pointers proven by jalr use, and one write-only unsigned 32-bit opaque word; repeated globals account for 13 leaves. Evidence and leaf map: docs/ai_context/PHASE5EF_TYPING.md.

blockers.rationale: 5EI: integrated func_80042B38/50 (D_800A1870/1874) and func_80042910 (D_800A1860 int + D_800A1868 u32 decl option a). Types from readers/opaque Stage 0, not opaque-word for 1860/1870/1874.

Stage 0 sweep after 5EH (read-only, tip 2234794): two remaining globals passed the opaque-word bar. D_800A1868 still READY-OPAQUE-WORD (decl via 42910). D_8009D28C reclassified READY-FROM-READER int state and INTEGRATED in 5EJ (not opaque-word — equality-tested state codes).

members.stage0: WRITE-ONLY: lui/sw only; stores 0 or 1; no lw anywhere in src or live asm
members.note: decl+cleared by integrated func_80042910; other write sites remain asm

members.stage0: stores constants 0/3/4/5/6/8; loads: word-copy sw to *v1 (func_80019154), bne vs 1 (A404) — no arith/deref-as-base/bitwise
members.reclassified: NOT opaque-word: distinct state codes + equality compare → int; signedness undetermined
members.former_blocker_reader: func_80019154 / func_8001D340 REMOVED as type-sites (use/copy only)

blockers.rationale: Stage 0 FAILED opaque-word bar: every load path does andi/and bit ops. That is narrowing evidence for an unsigned flags word — NOT bare opaque u32. Distinct bucket so the technique does not become the width-cheat. Type: unsigned int (flags bits 0 and 1 used). 5EK: integrated func_80087198/87414 (store 1/2, return 0; sb+ret0 fingerprint).

members.type: unsigned int (flags; andi 1 / andi 2 / and -2 / and -3)

blockers.rationale: 6 globals / 8 setters integrated exact in 5EH (func_80042BD8…func_80042C64). u32 opaque-word ruling proven.

blockers.note: ROM words prove sb/sh macro stores stay PRE-JR with a nop slot (func_80033A2C sb; func_800C6ED8/C6EE8 sh; func_800C6EC0 dual-sh; func_8001A374 has a cc1-filled li slot). Never the same delay-slot answer as 5EF: current maspsx already emits the shape; the 5EF patch deliberately skips sb/sh. Remaining work is per-global typing + integration.

blockers.rationale: Large 32-bit literal synthesis (lui;ori) verified ROM-exact under era 2.21 + --dont-expand-li, for both bit15-clear and bit15-set low halves. Tested 0xFFF003FF (clear), 0x51EB851F (set, ÷100 magic), 0x000FFC00 (set) vs ROM opcode+immediate fields. cc1 emits the PSY-Q li-high + ori-low split natively; GNU as expands high-only li to lui; feared lui;ori-vs-lui;addiu divergence did not occur. No flag change. Not a blocker — constant-heavy computational functions are approachable as a separate phase.
blockers.note: Capability, not a leaf inventory. Integration of mult/div/mask functions that use these constants is a future phase.

func_80055724 (0x45F24, 15 words): gp arena zero-fill loop, era -G8, two new gp globals (D_8009D058 int* cursor @ gp+0x2E8, D_8009D064 int count @ gp+0x2F4; _gp=0x8009CD70). Empty 8-byte frame SOLVED: cc1 2.7.2 emits vars=8 home slots naturally (no dummy local needed). Blocker is a three-way -O2 scheduling tension: while-form keeps frame+regs but hoists the p load above the blez guard (13/15, loses count-delay nop + loop-top nop); if+for keeps frame+regs but duplicates the blez and steals the prologue into guard-1's slot; if+do/while gets word order but vars=0 and i/p regs flipped. era -O1 -G8 output is byte-identical to -O2 for both leading phrasings (no per-function -O support from this leaf). Closest candidate (while-form, 13/15) stashed: 'park phase5eu func_80055724 while-form 13-15 (p-load hoist residual)'. Residual is scheduling, not allocation proven — pins not yet at the 6A8D4 bar.
blockers.evidence: single-leaf era compiles on branch phase5eu-gp-loop-55724; five -O2 phrasings + two -O1 confirmations, all objdump-recorded in session
